home.subtitle: Premium cuts, fades and beard work. Crafted by a team that takes pride in every detail.

teaserTeam.title: Our Team
teaserTeam.body: A small crew of experienced barbers, each with their own style and specialty.

teaserPrices.title: Services and Prices
teaserPrices.body: Classic cuts, fades, beard trims and combo deals. Transparent pricing, no surprises.

teaserContact.title: Find Us
teaserContact.body: Maarschalk Fochstraat 5, Leopoldsburg. Open six days a week, walk-ins welcome.

about.heading: More than a haircut. An experience.
about.text: K.O.B. Barbershop was born out of a simple conviction: every man deserves a great cut. Based in the heart of Leopoldsburg, we have built a space where precision meets relaxation. Traditional barbering craft is paired here with a sharp modern eye. Our team of skilled barbers takes pride in every detail, from the first consultation to the final finish. Whether you are after a classic cut, a clean fade or a beard that turns heads, you will leave us looking and feeling your best. Walk-ins are always welcome.

team.intro: A tight-knit crew of skilled barbers, each bringing their own technique and personality to the chair.

datetime.heading: Choose a date and time
datetime.noSlots: No available slots on this date.
datetime.closedDay: The shop is closed on this date.

contact.heading: Your details
contact.phoneHint: International format recommended, needed for appointment reminders.
contact.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +32 476 00 00 00 or 0476 00 00 00).

confirm.heading: Confirm your booking
confirm.name: Name
confirm.slotTaken: This time slot was just booked by someone else. Please choose another time.

done.heading: Booking confirmed!
done.body: We look forward to seeing you. You will receive a confirmation via WhatsApp.
done.cancelLinkHint: Save this link to cancel your appointment. Cancellation is free up to 1.5 hours before your appointment.
done.cancelDisclaimer: Cancellation within 1.5 hours of your appointment will result in a charge of half the service price. Your name and phone number are stored.

cancel.cancelledBody: Your appointment has been cancelled. We hope to see you soon.
cancel.alreadyCancelled: This appointment has already been cancelled.
cancel.alreadyPast: This appointment has already taken place and cannot be cancelled.
cancel.invalidToken: This cancellation link is invalid or not found.
cancel.onTimeInfo: Cancellation is still possible. Click the button below to confirm.
cancel.lateWarning: Your appointment is less than 1.5 hours away. Cancelling will incur a charge of half the service price (€{amount}). Your name and phone number will be stored.
cancel.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to cancel?
